programme.title: Help! I Bought It at Auction with Sarah Beeny
programme.desc: In Herne Bay, Leezac creates a modern home on a modest budget, but a steel beam's causing problems. Alice hits a brick wall with her Somerset townhouse.

programme.title: Grayson Perry Has Seen the Future
programme.desc: Artist Sir Grayson Perry visits Silicon Valley to understand how AI and robotics will shape the future, exploring profound questions about what it is to be human.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Secret Service
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay infiltrates struggling restaurants with the help of a secret insider. Can Patrick change his toxic ways to save his business and his marriage.

programme.title: The Copenhagen Test
programme.desc: Spy thriller with Simu Liu. Hunted by his own agency, and with his body betraying him, can Alexander stay alive long enough to save those he loves the most.

programme.title: The Copenhagen Test
programme.desc: Series finale of the spy thriller. As Alexander races against the clock, Parker discovers a secret message hiding in plain sight..

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Sir Robert, who's 93, is rushed to St George's with a low heart rate. Brad, who's crushed his finger at work, talks about what masculinity means to him and male role models.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Cafe 36 in Chicago. Husband-and-wife team Terry and Carol are stuck in the past and their head chef's lax attitude is driving away customers.

programme.title: Heatwave
programme.desc: Erotic thriller with Kat Graham. Claire gets more than she bargained for when she begins a steamy affair with her boss's wife. But she's got her own dark past too.

programme.title: Kirstie's House of Craft
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp shows us how to create beautiful crafts with items we already own. This time, Kirstie turns trash into treasure with Mexican tin art, soap recycling and a tin can dog.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House New Home
programme.desc: In Weston-super-Mare, can two novice renovators completely transform a dilapidated Georgian-style house that's divided into flats, for just £40k.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Another chance to catch yesterday's new episode, with Ranvir Singh in Dictionary Corner. Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: With Frasier's help, Sam's getting his life back in order. Is now a good time for Diane to reveal the truth about her relationship with the psychiatrist.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam discovers an intimate secret about Diane's romance with Frasier - is he right in thinking that she's still madly in love with him.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The bar holds a Halloween fancy dress party. Cliff meets the woman of his dreams, who's dressed as Tinker Bell, but panics about their first date.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray buys his dad an expensive aquarium for his 65th birthday, just like the one in the Chinese restaurant. At first Frank loves it, but then one fish dies..

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray accompanies Debra to a high school reunion, where he's unmasked as a former nerd. Worse still, Debra was one of the cool kids who used to tease him.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra writes to Marie to tell her to stop interfering after she ruins her Tupperware party, but a shocked Ray tries to intercept the letter.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: When Frasier's radio programme is syndicated in Spokane, it replaces a local broadcaster's show, enraging his callers.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A birthday party held in Daphne's honour sets in motion some rather surprising and unexpected events.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles finally convinces Daphne's father in England to return to her mother in Seattle.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles and Daphne marry on an impulse while on holiday in Reno but are forced to hide their good news when they return to Seattle.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The owner of the Mill Street Bistro in Ohio claims to have the best menu between New York and LA. But the diners don't agree.

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Channel 4's midday news summary.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Birmingham, the lads fall out over a bench that Henry thinks is worth something. Who'll have the last laugh.

programme.title: Matt Baker: Travels with Mum & Dad
programme.desc: In North Yorkshire's Herriot Country, Matt takes to the skies, Mike meets the ancestors of the famous 'Mouseman' furniture maker and Janice visits a stunning lavender farm.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Ranvir Singh in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Martin and Mandy want to make the permanent move to Mayenne in France. Can Jean Johansson find them, their three motorbikes and two prized parrots their forever home for £50k.

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Brian and Paula are on the move after closing their eatery in France. And have Louisa's guesthouse fortunes changed in Spain.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Ben and Billie embark on a dramatic makeover for a Valentine's Day event. Nick and Nicole battle to turn a crumbling façade into a striking showpiece.

programme.title: Jasmine Harman's Renovation in the Sun
programme.desc: Jon reaches a big milestone with his health. But with the garden wall still not finished and Jasmine getting called away for a job, it's all work and no play for Jon.

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Channel 4's flagship news programme. Including the weather.

programme.title: Paul Merton: Driving Amazing Trains
programme.desc: In Switzerland, Paul travels on the stunning Glacier Express and drives a funicular train to the Reichenbach Falls, where Sherlock Holmes met his fictional demise.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: In a particularly active episode, Armando Iannucci performs a daring stunt, Kumail Nanjiani moves bowling pins with oven gloves, and Joanna Page unwisely attempts a handstand.

programme.title: Big Mood
programme.desc: The comedy with Nicola Coughlan and Lydia West returns. Maggie and Eddie haven't spoken for a year, until they're reunited as bridesmaids at a friend's wedding.

programme.title: Big Mood
programme.desc: Comedy with Nicola Coughlan and Lydia West. Maggie and Whitney lock horns over Eddie's affection as they go on an odyssey across London to secure tickets to a drag show.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers settle in for I'm a Celebrity... South Africa, Britain's Got Talent, The Dog House, The Apprentice, Secret Garden and the news on the Artemis II moon mission.

programme.title: Sky Coppers
programme.desc: The drone police join the search for a woman who left a suicide note and vanished. Officers track a dodgy dog-breeding gang to a horrific hovel. And a wrongdoer's hiding up a tree.

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In East Anglia, a seriously ill dialysis patient desperately needs fluids. And on Canvey Island, the medics take over the breathing of a motorcyclist who's bleeding from his ear.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits some of the restaurants he set out to save, including The Mixing Bowl, The Olde Stone Mill, Peter's and Campania. Have things improved.

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Alison Hammond hosts the new series giving extraordinary people a chance to perform the one song that tells their story. In Liverpool, a teen sings Bocelli for his foster mum.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Andi and Neil dream of retiring to Spain with their son Joel and spaniel Dixie. Can Laura Hamilton find their perfect place close to the coastal town of Mazarrón, near Murcia, for £145,000.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House New Home
programme.desc: George squeezes into an Edwardian workers cottage that's only half the size of a squash court, and visits a house with overwhelmingly Italian décor.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Another chance to catch yesterday's new episode, with Ranvir Singh in Dictionary Corner. Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam unwittingly breaks his cardinal rule never to date a married woman and finds himself on the spot when her husband appears.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Coach falls madly in love with a woman named Irene, who agrees to marry him. True to form, Sam takes a romantic interest in Irene's daughter.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Irene has won two million dollars on the lottery and called off the wedding, but Coach remains convinced that she'll come back to him on their big day.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: All Ray wants for Christmas is a little loving from his wife, but they can't get any privacy.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray volunteers for a Battle of Gettysburg re-enactment to spend some quality time with his father - but it turns out that they're fighting on opposite sides.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray's oldest living relative, his great aunt Sarina, turns up from Italy to help Ally with a school project about family trees.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles are pitted against the owner of a local garage in a war over principles and two dollars. Daphne leaves the Crane household for the last time.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier's attempts to become condominium president take a new turn when he persuades Martin to run as a 'puppet' candidate.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz's 20-year-old cousin (guest star Zooey Deschanel) is quite the party girl. When she arrives in Seattle, Frasier finds it impossible to keep up with her.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier plots revenge on Bulldog after he finds himself on the receiving end of an office prank.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the conclusion to the Mill Street Bistro saga, Gordon's disagreement with the proprietor erupts into one of his most intense confrontations yet.

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Channel 4's midday news summary.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to Staffordshire to meet petrolhead Martin, who's also the organiser of a local music festival.

programme.title: Matt Baker: Travels with Mum & Dad
programme.desc: In Alnwick, the Bakers immerse themselves in castle life, take on extreme gardening and visit the shop where the 'Keep Calm and Carry On' poster was discovered.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Ranvir Singh in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Best friends Jan and Chris look for a dream holiday home in Almería, Spain. Can Laura Hamilton find the perfect place for £150k that works for both of their families.

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where
programme.desc: In Italy, will Kevin and Laura finish their renovations before guests arrive? And can Vicky and Aurelian rise to the challenge as they open a bakery in France.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Ben and Billie's apartment gets their hearts racing as their Valentine's event approaches. Mark and Sandra juggle a gîte renovation and tractor lessons.

programme.title: Jasmine Harman's Renovation in the Sun
programme.desc: It's the final push, as the family's big summer bash is almost upon them. With guests about to arrive, can they gather momentum and complete everything in time.

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Channel 4's flagship news programme. Including the weather.

programme.title: Unreported World
programme.desc: Japanese prisons have become retirement homes for a rising number of elderly convicts. Krishnan Guru-Murthy investigates the country's geriatric crime wave.
